## Summary

- 

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low: docs/UI copy only
- [ ] Medium: app behavior or validation changed
- [ ] High: writes files, restores backups, runs commands, or changes release packaging

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run release:check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run release:quality` for release work

## Safety Notes

Mention any impact on real config files, backup/restore, command sandbox, or portable packaging.
